post.description: Create an account with a password and return a Bearer JWT.
Verify email + password and return a Bearer JWT.

Dev convenience: create-or-get an account by email (no password) and auto-grant an entitlement.
Returns a real Bearer JWT as access_token, plus learner_id for the legacy X-Learner-Id header.
Disabled when dev_mode is off.
Bulk-ingest items as JSON. Validate-all-then-commit; rejects the whole batch on any error.

Bulk-ingest items from an .xlsx authored in your generator pipeline.
`options` cell is pipe-delimited, e.g.  6|7|8|9 .

Import a Vettalume question-bank workbook (.xlsx) — the bulk-upload path for authors.

Handles both layouts:
  * one sheet with an `Exam` column, and
  * one sheet PER exam (the tab name is the exam, e.g. CAT / GMAT / GRE).

Builds the knowledge graph from Topic / Subtopic / Prerequisites, resolves A–E / multi / sequence
answers, and ingests the questions across all sheets in one atomic transaction. `IRT b` is ignored
(it is derived by calibration). Dangling prerequisites are reported as warnings, not failures.

schema.title: Response Ingest Question Bank Xlsx Ingest Question Bank Xlsx Post

get.description: Section -> topic -> concept hierarchy for an exam (the 'tree' / filing taxonomy).

schema.title: Response Get Tree Catalog Tree Get

get.description:
Return the next question for a concept. Phase 0 picks the first eligible item; Phase 1's
problem bandit replaces the selection. The learner never sees difficulty, the answer, or the
solution here.

The engine's decision: which topic (ZPD + bandit) -> learn/revise -> which question.
Returns teaching content when starting a new concept. `exclude` is a comma-separated list of
item IDs to skip (questions already shown or skipped this session).

schema.title: Response Next Step Learn Next Get

post.description:
Record a Learning answer (practice context): updates blended mastery, MAPLE edge, and
review scheduling. Returns the full P/D/M breakdown.

schema.title: Response Submit Answer Learn Answer Post

get.description:
The full learning map: topics with lock/mastery/recommended flags and per-concept state.
Powers the section view (topic cards, ZPD-next badges, progress meters).

schema.title: Response Learning Map Learn Map Get

get.description: Mastered concepts whose memory trace has decayed below threshold — due for spaced review.
Per-concept analytics: mastery breakdown, MAPLE edge, learning progress, attempt count.

schema.title: Response Concept Detail Learn Concept  Node Id  Get

get.description:
Full per-chapter analytics for the current learner: KPIs, difficulty spread, improvement
over time, learning-vs-practice split, strongest/weakest concepts, MAB-recommended actions,
and the subtopic breakdown. Identify the chapter by `topic` (name) or `topic_id`.

post.description:
DEV ONLY — drive the MAB for the current learner and record real responses, so the analytics
have something to show without hand-answering. Reads each served item's correct answer from the
DB and answers correctly with probability `accuracy`.

DEV — run the calibration worker over this exam's COLD responses and write a versioned
parameter set. `activate` makes it the live params (mirrored onto Item.irt_*).

schema.title: Response Run Detail Irt Runs  Run Id  Get
Response Item Params Irt Item  Item Id  Get

post.description:
Score the current learner's COLD/mock responses into an IRT theta (-3..+3) + SE via EAP
(or method=elo). Persists the estimate.

DEV — the release gate. Generate a synthetic population with known a,b,c, run the exact
calibration loop, and report parameter recovery. Calibration is only safe to trust if it
recovers difficulty here.

Begin a mock. mode = item_adaptive (GMAT-style) | mst (GRE-style) | fixed_form (CAT-style).
Returns the session and the first question.

schema.title: Response Next Question Mock  Sid  Next Get
Response Submit Answer Mock  Sid  Answer Post

get.description: The checkpointed state — call this to resume a mock after a dropped connection.

schema.title: Response Score Mock  Sid  Score Get

get.description: Population exposure — how often each item has been served across mocks (exposure control input).

schema.title: Response Exposure Mock Exposure Report Get

get.description:
Classify the learner's practice misses by cause: per-node cause mixture, leak ranking, the
foundations/execution/selection strategy decomposition, and an honest ability range.

schema.title: Response Get Leaks Diagnosis Leaks Get

get.description:
Decompose one mock's misses by the same taxonomy (a rendering, separate from the practice
diagnosis).

schema.title: Response Mock Decomposition Diagnosis Mock  Sid  Get

post.description:
Generate or re-generate the study plan from the current diagnosis. Refuses to plan when there
is not enough practice signal. On a re-plan, returns the diff and a plain-language explanation.

get.description: The SKU catalog: per-course free + paid tiers (multi-currency) and the multi-exam bundle.

schema.title: Response Get Catalog Billing Catalog Get
Response Get Entitlements Billing Entitlements Get
Response Grant Free Billing Grant Free Post

post.description: Record a purchase and grant entitlements. Does not move money (no PSP wired).

get.description:
Full mock debrief. The item-by-item review with solutions is a paid surface; the free tier
gets the honest score, cause decomposition, timing, and counts. Gating only bites when
enforce_entitlements is on.

schema.title: Response Mock Debrief Review Mock  Sid  Get
Response Review Queue Review Queue Get

get.description:
The platform's published accuracy record: band coverage and mean error over verified
outcomes. Provisional until enough outcomes accumulate.
One identity, the learner's course entitlements (AC-01).

Preview the priors that would transfer into this course from the learner's other courses,
without persisting (AC-02). Transferred priors are always provisional — estimates to confirm.

schema.title: Response Warm Start Preview Account Warm Start Get

post.description: Compute and persist transferred priors for this course.

schema.title: Response Warm Start Apply Account Warm Start Post

post.description:
Create (or upsert) a single item. Goes through the same validated ingest path as bulk upload,
so the authored-vs-derived boundary (no IRT a/b/c authoring) is enforced identically.

post.description:
Admin-gated bulk upload — same question-bank workbook format as the authors' path: one sheet
per exam (tab name = exam) OR a single sheet with an `Exam` column. Builds the graph from
Topic/Subtopic/Prerequisites and ingests every question atomically; returns the import report.

get.description: Learning content for a subtopic: the concept explanation + its video links.

post.description:
Bulk-upload a subtopic's quiz from a simple .xlsx (Question / options / Answer / Difficulty).
Exam, section and concept come from the subtopic itself, so the sheet only carries questions.
scope: 'both' (practice + mocks, default), 'practice_only', or 'mock_only'.

post.description: Remove a student from a course (revokes their entitlement for that exam).

ItemPublic.title: ItemPublic
ItemPublic.description:
What a learner is allowed to see for the next question. Note: NO correct_answer, NO
solution, and NO difficulty (difficulty is never shown to the learner, per the engine).
